ham.subject: Your XYZ SaaS subscription renewal - action required
ham.body:
Dear John,

We hope you are enjoying the benefits of XYZ SaaS. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription is set to renew on 15th May 2026. Your current plan is the Premium tier at INR 9999 per month.

To continue uninterrupted service, simply click the link below to review and confirm your renewal details.

<URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing XYZ SaaS.

Best regards,
XYZ SaaS Team

spam.subject: Urgent: IT Helpdesk Ticket #98765 - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Hello,

This is an automated notification from the IT Helpdesk. Your ticket #98765 has been flagged for urgent review. The issue reported: "Unable to access corporate VPN".

Please confirm the following details at the earliest:
1. Your employee ID
2. The device model you are using
3. The last error message you received

Reply to this email with the requested information or click the link below to update your ticket status.

<URL>

Failure to respond within 24 hours may result in temporary suspension of VPN access. If you believe this is a mistake, please verify your credentials and proceed accordingly.

Regards,
IT Helpdesk Team
